name: Sinful Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the jell-o and boiling water in a bowl until dissolved.
2. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
3. Stir in the mashed bananas, chopped pecans, frozen strawberries, and crushed pineapple.
4. Divide the mixture into two bowls.
5. Pour half of the mixture into a 12x8 inch pan and refrigerate for 1 hour to set.
6. Keep the remaining jell-o at room temperature.
7. Spread sour cream over the chilled jell-o layer in one bowl.
8. Pour the remaining jell-o on top of the sour cream layer.
9. Cover the pan with plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm, about 1-1/2 hours or overnight.
Enjoy your Sinful Salad!
